title: Parser Registry
description: Manifests for every parser/extractor used by the loop. Stored at .work/semantic-loop/parser-registry.json.

artifact_type.description: The artifact type this parser handles, matching inventory artifact_types.

origin.description: How the parser was obtained, per the selection order in LOOP.md. gallery = copied unmodified from .agent-loop/tools/; gallery-adapted = copied and modified for this repository.

gallery_source.description: For gallery/gallery-adapted origins: the gallery folder the parser was copied from, e.g. '.agent-loop/tools/java-structure'.

adaptations.description: For gallery-adapted origins: what was changed in the cache copy and why.

script_path.description: Path under .cache/scripts/parsers/ for cached/custom/generated parsers; null when project or standard tooling is invoked directly.

invocation.description: Command line or method used to run the parser.

output_schema.description: Identifier of the output contract, e.g. 'source-graph-fragment-v1'.

validation_status.description: Generated parsers must be 'validated' before their output feeds final artefacts.

tests.description: Smoke tests or example inputs used to validate the parser.

writes_source_tree.description: Must always be false: parsers never write to the source tree.
